intro: Dealing with aggressive hornets on your Roslyn property requires immediate professional attention. Our experienced technicians handle hornet nests of all sizes with proven methods and guaranteed results.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Roslyn and the greater Long Island area with dedicated pest control expertise for years. Our licensed technicians use safe, environmentally responsible removal techniques and offer same-day emergency service to protect your home or business from hornet threats.
localContext: Roslyn's beautiful historic homes, tree-lined streets, and proximity to Roslyn Pond and Gerry Park create ideal nesting conditions for hornets, especially during warmer months. From the estates near Old Northern Boulevard to properties in Roslyn Estates and Roslyn Harbor, our team understands the unique pest challenges facing this prestigious North Shore community.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a hornet emergency in Roslyn?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency hornet removal services throughout Roslyn and surrounding Long Island areas. During peak season, we prioritize urgent calls where hornets pose immediate danger, especially around children, pets, or high-traffic areas. Call us immediately if you've discovered an active nest on your property.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough property inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and safe disposal of the nest. The final cost depends on nest location, size, and accessibility. We provide upfront pricing with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Roslyn's residential areas?
faqs.answer: Yes, Roslyn's mature trees, gardens, and proximity to water sources like Roslyn Pond create attractive nesting environments for hornets. We frequently service properties throughout Roslyn Village, Roslyn Estates, and Roslyn Harbor, particularly in wooded areas and homes with eaves, attics, or outbuildings where hornets commonly build nests.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted treatment methods that eliminate hornets while minimizing risk to your family, pets, and the environment. Our technicians are fully trained in safe application techniques and will advise you on any necessary precautions during and immediately after treatment. We recommend keeping children and pets indoors during the removal process.
